nodes.name: Watch RFP Upload Folder
nodes.notes: Configure: Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_DRIVE_FOLDER_ID with your actual RFP intake folder ID from the Drive URL.

nodes.name: AI Extract RFP Requirements
nodes.notes: AI Agent using Groq. The Groq Chat Model sub-node must be connected to the 'Model' input of this node.

parameters.text:
=You are an expert RFP analyst. Extract structured requirements from the RFP document below and return ONLY a valid raw JSON object — no markdown, no code fences, no explanation.

Return exactly this JSON structure:
{
  "client_name": "Company or organization name",
  "project_title": "Title of the project or RFP",
  "project_scope": "2-3 sentence summary of what is needed",
  "budget_range": "Exact budget text from document or Not specified",
  "submission_deadline": "ISO date string YYYY-MM-DD or Not specified",
  "project_start_date": "ISO date string YYYY-MM-DD or Not specified",
  "contract_duration": "Duration string e.g. 12 months or Not specified",
  "evaluation_criteria": ["criterion 1", "criterion 2"],
  "required_sections": ["section 1", "section 2"],
  "technical_requirements": ["requirement 1", "requirement 2"],
  "key_contacts": [{"name": "name", "email": "email", "role": "role"}],
  "industry": "Industry sector e.g. Healthcare Finance Government",
  "project_type": "e.g. Software Development Consulting Infrastructure",
  "complexity": "Low or Medium or High",
  "estimated_value": 0
}

FILE NAME: {{ $json.fileName }}

DOCUMENT TEXT:
{{ $json.rawText.substring(0, 12000) }}

options.systemMessage: You are an expert RFP analyst. You extract structured data from procurement documents. Always respond with raw valid JSON only — never use markdown, code fences or any explanation text before or after the JSON.

nodes.name: AI Model – Requirement Extraction
nodes.notes: llama-3.3-70b-versatile — fast and accurate for structured extraction. Alternatives: mixtral-8x7b-32768, llama3-70b-8192.

nodes.name: Clean & Parse AI Output
nodes.notes: Reads $json.output from the AI Agent node (not .message.content like the old OpenAI node). Strips any stray markdown fences and parses JSON safely.

nodes.name: Fetch Past Proposals (KB
nodes.notes: Configure: Replace YOUR_PAST_PROPOSALS_FOLDER_ID in the q parameter value with your actual folder ID. Uses Drive API v3 directly — avoids the broken search operation bug in n8n Google Drive node.

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: '1odaBEvPyuzyRwGktzYeefyoOFnV554HM' in parents and mimeType != 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and trashed = false

nodes.name: AI Generate Proposal Draft
nodes.notes: AI Agent using Groq for proposal writing. The Groq Chat Model sub-node must be connected to the 'Model' input of this node. Update the company background in the prompt text.

options.systemMessage: You are a senior proposal writer at a professional services company. You write detailed, persuasive RFP responses that win contracts. Write in clear professional Markdown. Never add preamble or meta-commentary — start directly with the Executive Summary heading.

nodes.name: AI Model – Proposal Writing
nodes.notes: Higher temperature (0.7) for more creative, natural-sounding proposal writing. Uses llama-3.3-70b-versatile.

nodes.name: Prepare Final Output Data
nodes.notes: Reads $json.output from the Agent node. Prepares clean objects for Salesforce and Google Docs.

nodes.name: Create Salesforce Opportunity
nodes.notes: Configure: Remove Industry__c if that custom field doesn't exist in your org or create it first in Salesforce Setup.

parameters.content:
## RFP INGESTION MODULE

Purpose:
Automatically detects and processes new RFP documents.                                            
Key Config:
✔ Replace Google Drive folder ID
✔ Ensure PDF format compatibility

Output:
Raw text + metadata ready for AI processing

## AI REQUIREMENT EXTRACTION

Purpose:
Convert unstructured RFP text into structured JSON.

What AI Extracts:
- Client name
- Project scope
- Budget & deadlines
- Technical requirements
- Evaluation criteria

Important:
✔ Always returns clean JSON
✔ Handles malformed AI responses safely

Output:
Structured RFP data for downstream automation

## KNOWLEDGE BASE ENRICHMENT

Purpose:
Enhance proposal quality using past proposals.

Benefit:
✔ Improves consistency
✔ Reuses winning proposal patterns

Output:
Requirements + reference context

## AI PROPOSAL GENERATION

Purpose:
Automatically generate a full RFP response.

Customization:
✔ Update company profile in prompt
✔ Adjust tone via temperature

AI Behavior:
- Tailored to extracted requirements
- Uses knowledge base references

Output:
Complete proposal draft (Markdown)

## OUTPUT STORAGE & CRM INTEGRATION

Purpose:
Store and track generated proposals.

Actions:
- Saves proposal in Google Docs
- Creates Salesforce Opportunity
- Adds key RFP details (deadline, value, scope)

Output:
Document link + Salesforce record

## REVIEW & NOTIFICATION SYSTEM

Purpose:
Ensure human review before submission.

Actions:
- Creates Salesforce task
- Attaches proposal + RFP link
- Sends Slack notification to team

##  RFP AUTOMATION WORKFLOW (AI-POWERED)

### WHAT THIS WORKFLOW DOES:
This workflow fully automates the RFP (Request for Proposal) lifecycle:
1. Detects new RFP files uploaded to Google Drive
2. Extracts and understands requirements using AI (Groq + LLaMA)
3. Generates a complete proposal draft automatically
4. Stores outputs (Google Docs + Salesforce)
5. Assigns review tasks and notifies team via Slack

### SETUP REQUIREMENTS:
- Google Drive (Trigger folder + Knowledge Base folder)
- Groq API (for AI processing)
- Salesforce account (Opportunity + Task creation)
- Google Docs account (to save proposals)
- Slack integration (for notifications)

###  WORKFLOW STEPS:
1. Trigger → New RFP uploaded
2. Extract → Read PDF content
3. AI Analysis → Convert text to structured JSON
4. Knowledge Base → Fetch past proposals
5. AI Writing → Generate proposal draft
6. Storage → Save to Google Docs + Salesforce
7. Task Creation → Assign review task
8. Notification → Alert team on Slack

### BENEFITS:
- Saves 90% manual effort in proposal writing
- Faster turnaround time for RFP submissions
- Standardized, high-quality proposals
- Centralized tracking via Salesforce
- Reduces human errors in requirement extraction

### IDEAL USE CASE:
Consulting firms, IT services companies, agencies handling frequent RFP submissions.

### IMPORTANT NOTES:
- Update folder IDs before running
- Customize company profile in proposal generator
- Validate AI output before final submission
